title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at EazyDiner Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at EazyDiner Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EazyDiner Ventures Solutions:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner Ventures Solutions!
